title: ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD BUILDING ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers qualifying customers financial assistance with their water bills. Provides a one-time crisis assistance payment of $150 or a bi-monthly discount of $25 on water bills for one year (six bills). 124 NE 181st Avenue Suite 109 Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Low-income customers of Rockwood Water People's Utility District Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3:45pm Email (503) 548-0217 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 405-7875 Main phone (503) 405-7877 Energy Assistance Line Main phone (503) 548-0217 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake For appointment after intake: -Current water bill -ID for everyone 18 years and older -Proof of income for the household in the last 30 days -Social security cards or numbers for everyone in the household LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Spanish, Ukrainian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Rockwood Water People's Utility District (parts of Fairview, Gresham, and Portland in Multnomah County only, within zip codes 97233, 97236, 97030, 97024, and 97230). SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1 block North of 181st Station, Blue Line MAX Services: Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD BUILDING
